Author: Miroslav Babitski
Name: System Monitor
Description: Live CPU & memory graphs in the style of the Windows 10 Task Manager. Place this action across a row of adjacent keys to form one wide graph — the more keys, the wider the screen. Use a second row for the other metric (top row = CPU, bottom row = RAM, automatically).

Actions.Name: System Monitor
Actions.Tooltip: Live CPU/RAM graph — place across a row of keys
